name: Fuu
description: Fuu (フウ) was a kunoichi from Takigakure and the jinchuuriki of Choumei, the Seven-Tails. Choumei has been captured and sealed by Akatsuki, causing her death when the beast was extracted.   ~!Upon her reincarnation, Choumei appears to have been resealed within Fuu.!~  (Source: Narutopedia)
